case_title: SHI XING LI VS. NAPOLEON A. AMBAYON II et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-02-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-24-2008 CONTINUED TO MAR-02-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST TEDDY TSAO-WU, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-24-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-09-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR# 2542. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST TEDDY TSAO-WU, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-02-2008 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-17-2008. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
